violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Establishment has an active FMC. Employee(s) - enough to cover all shifts of operation - must successfully complete an approved course in food safety management. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

A tray of baked goods was observed cooling on the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026

The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. Employee(s) must register in, and successfully complete, an approved course in food safety management. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
Employees were observed putting on gloves without washing their hands. Food employees must wash their hands before putting on gloves. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025
Trays of baked cookies were observed on the hand-washing sink. A hand-washing sink must not be used for purposes other than hand washing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

Staff failed to sanitize equipment and utensils after washing and rinsing them. After being cleaned, equipment and utensils must be sanitized in the 3-bay-sink or dishwasher. Inspector reviewed proper sanitizer (chlorine/bleach) set-up using the 3-bay sink. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/25/2025

The cutting board of the prep unit observed to be very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets of the prep unit and the 2-door glass lowboy unit were observed in poor repair, splitting away from the doors. Gaskets must be replaced. New Violation. Correct By: 04/25/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the shelving for air drying have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. Shelving must be cleaned. New Violation. Correct By: 03/28/2025
Refrigerator door gasket of the prep unit lowboy observed in poor repair. New Violation. Correct By: 02/16/2024
